changeSet.author: ahri-pathology
changeSet.comment: Backfill missing notebook_departments for legacy Pathology Laboratory templates and pathology workflow entries without rewriting workflow_type.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON lower(trim(ts.name)) IN ('pathology', 'pathology laboratory') WHERE ( n.title = 'Pathology Laboratory' OR n.title LIKE 'Pathology Laboratory - Lab %' OR n.workflow_type IN ( 'pathology', 'histopathology_biopsy_tissue', 'peripheral_smear_bone_marrow_morphology', 'fnac', 'cytology_liquid_based_pap_smear' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook parent WHERE parent.id = n.parent_notebook_id AND ( parent.title = 'Pathology Laboratory' OR parent.title LIKE 'Pathology Laboratory - Lab %' OR parent.workflow_type IN ( 'pathology', 'histopathology_biopsy_tissue', 'peripheral_smear_bone_marrow_morphology', 'fnac', 'cytology_liquid_based_pap_smear' ) ) ) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_departments existing WHERE existing.notebook_id = n.id );

INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT child.id, parent_departments.test_section_id FROM clinlims.notebook child JOIN clinlims.notebook_departments parent_departments ON parent_departments.notebook_id = child.parent_notebook_id WHERE child.parent_notebook_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_departments existing WHERE existing.notebook_id = child.id AND existing.test_section_id = parent_departments.test_section_id );
